description: OctahedronHero.tsx (900 LOC) and three.js currently load eagerly on the home page, inflating first-paint cost. Goal: dynamic-import three + the OctahedronHero scene so the hero ships a lightweight placeholder first and hydrates the WebGL after critical content paints. Mobile-first — phone bandwidth is the constraint that matters.\n\nWhy: home page is the entry point; first-paint speed is a major UX lever especially on cellular.
title: Lazy-load WebGL octahedron hero to shrink initial bundle
